notes: Named, versioned test recipes for the WASP sandbox. Get-ScenarioSpec.ps1 resolves a name to a
full config; Run-Scenario.ps1 executes (or grades an existing RPT) and emits a Standard
Run-Result JSON + a soak-ledger row. Flags listed under 'flags' are set on the mission at boot
(name -> value). 'requires' names a harness capability the recipe needs that may not be merged
yet (the driver warns rather than silently mis-running). popPin is the WFBE_C_TEST_POPTIER_PIN
value (per-commander team count; -1 = organic population). asserts.metric references the flat
metric keys Run-Scenario computes from analyze_soak.py output: serverFpsMedian, serverFpsMin,
hcFpsMedian, aiTotPeak, guerPeak, captures, arrivalPct, maxTownsWest, maxTownsEast, hours.
severity=fail -> a miss makes the run FAIL; severity=watch -> a miss makes it WATCH.

defend-town.description: One HC, moderate population. Baseline: teams found, move, and hold captured towns; server holds frame.

big-assault.description: Two HCs, high population. Stress: assault progresses and the server holds a usable frame under load.

load-ramp.description: Sweep population LOW->MAX at fixed HC count and chart server/HC FPS vs unit count. Locates the FPS knee.

idle-soak.description: Low population, long run, no forced action. Leak/stability sentinel: FPS stays flat and the error stream stays clean.

hc-split.description: Same population run at 1 HC then 2 HC. Answers whether a 2nd HC raises the FPS knee or just relocates load (top open perf question).

flight-probe.description: Force high own-town count + Aircraft-Factory ownership for one side and observe whether an AI commander ever fields and flies air. Optionally A/B the SLX_AI_Steering flight mod.

a-life-probe.description: GUER Director aliveness. Low population, no forced captures: does GDIR_LEDGER totalStr hold/grow (alive) vs decay to zero (inert), and does GDIR_ORDER fire at a nonzero cadence? Regression sentinel for PR #815.
